title: There’s nothing like an RPG over vacation
summary: Players seeking chill, immersive games for vacation time are discovering People of Note, a music-focused RPG from Annapurna Interactive and Iridium Studios. The game follows Cadence, an aspiring pop singer competing against a rival boy band, offering the perfect escapist experience for a week-long getaway.
content:
With a vacation comes a big choice: What game should I focus on during the trip? I thought about grinding out the harder levels of Super Meat Boy 3D, but I was looking for something more chill. I could have dabbled more with Slay the Spire II, but I already know that's a game I'll be playing for a long time. I wanted something that I could really get lost in and finish in a little over a week. People of Note, a new music-focused RPG from Annapurna Interactive and Iridium Studios, turned out to be exactly what I needed.
In the game, you play as aspiring pop singer Cadence. What starts as a journey to outperform a popular boy band turns into  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 假期中没有什么比得上RPG游戏
zh.summary: 寻求假期休闲沉浸式游戏的玩家发现了《Note的人们》,这是Annapurna Interactive和Iridium Studios推出的以音乐为主题的RPG游戏。游戏跟随有志成为流行歌手的Cadence,与竞争对手男孩乐队较量,为期一周的假期提供了完美的逃避体验。

title: The AI apps are coming for your PC
summary: AI applications are rapidly expanding into personal computing as a significant new software category. The Verge examines this emerging trend of AI tools designed for consumer PCs alongside other notable developments in technology and culture.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 124, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, send me your Coachella fits, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about restaurant bread and GLP-1s  and Lenny Rachitsky and Artemis II fashion, watching the new boy band doc because I will always watch a boy band doc, also watching every clip I can find from Justin Bieber's Coachella set, filling the Schitt's Creek-shaped hole in my heart with Big Mistakes, getting increasingly excited about The Mandalorian and Grogu, and watering my new lawn so it …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI应用程序正在进入你的个人电脑
zh.summary: AI应用程序作为一个重要的新软件类别,正在迅速扩展到个人计算领域。The Verge审视了这一新兴趋势,即为消费者PC设计的AI工具,以及科技和文化的其他重要发展。

title: Great white sharks are overheating
summary: Great white sharks face severe physiological stress as ocean temperatures rise due to climate change. Scientists warn these apex predators are among the most vulnerable marine species to rapid warming in their habitats.
content: The sharks might also be the most physiologically vulnerable to warming waters.

zh.title: 大白鲨正在过热
zh.summary: 由于气候变化导致海洋温度上升,大白鲨面临严重的生理压力。科学家警告称,这些顶级掠食者是对其栖息地快速升温最为脆弱的海洋物种之一。

title: Once close enough for an acquisition, Stripe and Airwallex are now going after each other
summary: Stripe and Airwallex, once serving different geographies and customer segments, are now directly competing as their business territories overlap. This shift signals intensifying competition in the global fintech payments market.
content: For most of its life, Airwallex and Stripe have mostly operated in different geographies, selling to different buyers. That's changing.

zh.title: 曾接近被对方收购，Stripe和Airwallex现在却在竞争
zh.summary: Stripe和Airwallex曾经服务于不同的地区和客户群体，现在随着业务领地重叠，两者正在直接竞争。这一转变表明全球金融科技支付市场竞争日益加剧。
